verses.text: Sabbath ni a bei khit ciangin Magdala khuami Mary, James nu Mary, leh Salome-te in Jesuh' luang a va zutna dingun paknamtui a va lei uh hi
Nipi ni zingsang tung nisuah phetin hanah a pai uh hi
Amaute khatlekhat kikum uh a, “Han kongvang hukna suangtum kua'n hong likkhiatsak ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua laitakin a khuadak uh leh a suangtum a kilikkhia khinsa-in a mu uh hi. (Tua suangtum a gol mahmah khat ahi hi
Han sungah a lut uh leh, a taklam pang uhah, puanpak a silh tangval khat a tu mu uh a, lamdangsa-in a lau uh hi
Tua tangvalpa in, “Lamdangsa kei un. Singlamteh tungah a kithat Nazareth khuami Jesuh na zong uh hi. Amah kithosak kik khin a, hih lai-ah om nawnlo hi. Amah a kisialna mun hong en un
Tu-in pai un la, Peter leh Jesuh' nungzui dangte kiangah hih thu va gen un. Note tungah hong gensa bangin Galilee gam amaute mai-ah pai hi; tua lai-ah amah na mu ding uh hi, ci hi, ci un,” a ci hi
Amaute in lamdangsa-in lau uh ahih manin han panin taisuak pah uh a, kuamah dang kiangah hih thu genlo uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Magdala khuami Mary tungah Jesuh Kilang

verses.text: (Sihna panin Jesuh a thawhkik khit ciangin ama sung pan dawi sagih a hawlkhiatna, Magdala khuami Mary tungah Nipi ni zingsang tungin kilang masa hi
Tuanu zong hong pai-in a dah a kapin a om Jesuh' lawm luite kiangah hih thu a va gen hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh a nuntakna thu leh tuanu mahmah in a muh khitna thu a genna a zak uh hangin, a thugen um zolo uh hi.
(Tua khit ciangin khuapi panin khuaneu-ah nungzui nihte a pai laitakun amaute tungah a mel tuam khatin Jesuh kilang hi
Hihte gel zong kileh kikin a lawm dangte uh kiangah gen uh a, ahi zongin amau' thugen, na umlo uh hi.

(Tua khit ciangin a tawpna-ah, an a nek laitakun nungzui sawmlekhatte mahmah kiangah a kilang hi. A kithawhkik sak khit ciangin amah a mu mite' thugen umlo uh ahih manin a lungkhauhna uh leh a uplohna hangun amaute a taii hi
Tua khit ciangin amaute tungah, “Leitung khempeuhah note pai kawikawi un la, mi khempeuh tungah Lungdamna Thu na hilh ta un
Lungdamna Thu umin tui a kiphum mi peuhpeuh in hotkhiatna ngah ding a, a umlo mi peuhpeuh in mawhsakna thuak ding uh hi
A um mite tungah hih vangliatna limte kipia ding hi: Keima hangin dawi hawlkhia thei ding uh a, pau dangte pau thei ding uh hi
Gul a lawn' hangun bangmah cilo ding uh a, gu tui a dawn hangun zong bangmah cilo ding uh hi. Cinate tungah a khut uh nga ding uh a, cinate dam ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
(Tua bangin Topa Jesuh in amaute tungah thu a gen khit ciangin vantungah kilato-in Pasian' taklamah a tu hi
Nungzuite zong mun khempeuhah pai-in thu a hilh uh hi. Topa in zong amaute' nasep seppih a, a thuhilhnate uh man hi, ci-in a lahna-in amaute tungah vangliatna limte a pia hi.)
